title: Popped Chorus
description: Popped chorus is a quality of life datapack to make minecraft a little more polished. Currently adds : waypoints/teleports, a unique gravestone/gravebundle system, making recovery compasses actually viable and craftable nametags
body:
Have you ever wanted a simple qol mod for your server or experience? Look no further, this datapack adds waypoints and craftable nametags, with plans for more in the future. Featuring a clean waypoint system that feels modded and is simple to use, as well as being a survival friendly teleport system, also includes a unique gravestone system using bundles, to aid this new system, upon respawning, you will be granted a recovery compass.

# **TO USE TELEPORT SCROLLS, RENAME THEM IN AN ANVIL TO THE NAME OF THE LOCATION YOU WANT TO TP TO, THEY MUST BE IN YOUR MAINHAND**
